tex.not P and Q implies not R or S iff: \text{not } P\text{ and }Q\Rightarrow \text{not } R\text{ or }S\Leftrightarrow \text{not } T\Rightarrow U
tex.(exists x.for all y.P(x,y)) implies (f: \left(\exists x.\, \forall y.\, P\left(x,y\right)\right)\Rightarrow \left(\forall y.\, \exists x.\, P\left(x,y\right)\right)
tex.(exists x.for all y.x loves y) implies: \left(\exists x.\, \forall y.\, x\text{ loves }y\right)\Rightarrow \left(\forall y.\, \exists x.\, x\text{ loves }y\right)
tex.P and (exists x.P(x) implies Q) impli: P\text{ and }\left(\exists x.\, P\left(x\right)\Rightarrow Q\right)\Rightarrow P\text{ and }\left(\forall y.\, Q\right)
tex.:{ { {:W V} {:V W} } ≡ W iff V }: : \left\{ \left\{ \left\{ : W V \right\} \left\{ : V W \right\} \right\} ~\equiv~ W\Leftrightarrow V \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ iff}}
tex.:{ :W W or V V or W }: : \left\{ : W W\text{ or }V V\text{ or }W \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ or+}}
tex.:{ :W or V :{:W U} :{:V U} U }: : \left\{ : W\text{ or }V : \left\{ : W U \right\} : \left\{ : V U \right\} U \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ or-}}
tex.:{ W or W ≡ W }: : \left\{ W\text{ or }W ~\equiv~ W \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ idempotency of or}}
tex.:{ :W or V V or W }: : \left\{ : W\text{ or }V V\text{ or }W \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ commutativity of or}}
tex.:{ (W or V) or U ≡ W or (V or U) }: : \left\{ \left(W\text{ or }V\right)\text{ or }U ~\equiv~ W\text{ or }\left(V\text{ or }U\right) \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ associativity of or}}
tex.:{ { W (V or U) } ≡ (W and V) or (W and: : \left\{ \left\{ W \left(V\text{ or }U\right) \right\} ~\equiv~ \left(W\text{ and }V\right)\text{ or }\left(W\text{ and }U\right) \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ distributivity of and cdot /or}}
tex.:{ W or (V and U) ≡ { (W or V) (W or U): : \left\{ W\text{ or }\left(V\text{ and }U\right) ~\equiv~ \left\{ \left(W\text{ or }V\right) \left(W\text{ or }U\right) \right\} \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ distributivity of or cdot /and}}
tex.:{ :W implies V :V implies U W implies U: : \left\{ : W\Rightarrow V : V\Rightarrow U W\Rightarrow U \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ transitivity of implies}}
tex.:{ :W iff V :V iff U W iff U }: : \left\{ : W\Leftrightarrow V : V\Leftrightarrow U W\Leftrightarrow U \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ transitivity of iff}}
tex.:{ W implies V ≡ not W or V }: : \left\{ W\Rightarrow V ~\equiv~ \text{not } W\text{ or }V \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ alternate def of implies}}
tex.:{ :W or V :not W V }: : \left\{ : W\text{ or }V : \text{not } W V \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ alternate or-}}
tex.:{ :W or V :not V W }: : \left\{ : W\text{ or }V : \text{not } V W \right\} \textcolor{black}{\text{ alternate or-}}
tex.∀ x ∈ A.∃ y ∈ B.x leq y: \forall x \in A.\, \exists y \in B.\, x\leq y
